ddt:Target.Name: 4RD W91 V2.4
ddt:Target.Description: C. CHASSAGNOL 65630 - UET C tel : +331 349 57726 DIAG ON CAN 4RD V2.4 (08/2005)

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery

Data.Name: Matrix gain for forward pole placement index (1-9) ¤C_Kcech_1_9]
Forward Dynamic FFD activation vehicle speed threshold ¤C_MediumVehicleSpeedOverThrs]
Forward Dynamic FFD deactivation vehicle speed threshold ¤C_MediumVehicleSpeedUnderThrs]
Max RWA value at high speed for Static FFD ¤C_HighSpeed_Max_SFF_Angle]
Vehicle Speed under which Forward Dynamic FFD angle equals 0 ¤C_VspeedLim_kmh]
Calibration of desired static gain index (1-28) ¤C_Fwd_Average_Tgs]
Dead Zone angle values for each vehicle speed (1-28) ¤C_Fwd_DeadZone_Vector_deg]
SFFD Limitation table - Vehicle speed vector (1-5) ¤C_SFF_Limitation_U_kmh]
Reverse Calibration of desired static gain index (1-28) ¤C_Rev_Average_Tgs]
Reverse Static FFD Table Vehicle Speed Vector (1-28) ¤C_Rev_VehicleSpeed_Vector_kmh]
Reverse Calibration of progressivity between SWA and static RWA index (1-28) ¤C_Rev_Slope]
Vehicle speeds for pole placement gain interpolation ¤C_Uint_kmh]
Calibration of progressivity between SWA and static RWA index (1-28) ¤C_Fwd_Slope]
Matrix gain for forward pole placement index (19-27) ¤C_Kcech_19_27]
Matrix gain for forward pole placement index (10-18) ¤C_Kcech_10_18]
Reverse Dead Zone angle values for each vehicle speed (1-28) ¤C_Rev_DeadZone_Vector_deg]
Enable/ disable static or dynamic functions ¤C_Functions_Enable_Disable]
Static FFD Table Vehicle Speed Vector (1-28) ¤C_Fwd_VehicleSpeed_Vector_kmh]

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Range/Performance
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit Low
Fuel Volume Regulator Control Circuit High
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit Low
Fuel Shutoff Valve "A" Control Circuit High

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: counting and storage of mute/ absent failure masked
counting and storage of mute/ absent failure not masked
Only faults reports and alerts that must remain active during cranking or sleeping periods are enabled
all faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled
all faults reports and alerts are enabled

Data.Name: Time where system continues to return to 0 when 1km/h was reached ¤T_TimeOneKmhBeforePowerOff]
Numéro de la ligne de production du bloc
Speed of actuator for oscillation routine
Maximum locked angle where driving of the car is authorized ¤C_MaxLockRWAForDriving]

Max V Speed saturation for models ¤T_U_ms_model_max]
Max Value for actuator oscillation (while in start routine)
Max difference between RWAOpenLoopRequest sent to ESP and ESP_RWASeen ¤T_RWAMaxGapSeenSent_deg]
Max number of tolerated overgap between RWAOpenLoopRequest sent to ESP and ESP_RWASeen ¤T_RWAGap_NumberOf_IV_BeforeDM]
RWA under which system is considered to be in position 0 ¤T_RWAToAllowPowerOff]

Rear Wheel Angle Position Request (Long List)

Item.Text: no vehicle speed gradient failure detected
no vehicle speed sign failure detected

Request.Name: WDBLId - Functional Data Processing Parameters Set
Request.Comment: For PFlots, tire index must be fixed at AD (with calculation it makes 4m) in order to get directly a speed in m/s

Device.Name: Actuator stuck ou capteur effet hall

Label.Text: lecture du nom de calibration en mémoire
ecriture nom de la calibration en mémoire
sélectionner la vitesse de l'actionneur (slow ou fast)
appuyer sur la fleche "play" pour raffraichir les infos et rendre le pilotage possible
Avant de lancer la routine (bouton start), il faut placer le véhicule sur un pont roues arrières pendantes
